meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Antigravity Template to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with scaling. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional-grade SaaS apps at lightning speed. Beginner-friendly.
content.answer_block: You can't scale projects because you are rebuilding the wheel every time. The Antigravity template standardizes your architecture, state management, and deployment pipelines. By combining this with Claude Code’s autonomous file manipulation, you transform from a manual coder into a high-leverage architect capable of delivering production-ready SaaS in days, not weeks.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your inbox is flooded with client revisions, and your codebase looks like a house of cards. Every new feature feels like a gamble because your previous projects lack structural integrity. You are trapped in the 'manual labor' cycle, trading hours for dollars with no room to breathe or scale.

But the best developers don't code harder; they code with leverage. The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard blueprint that turns your chaotic workflow into a predictable, repeatable machine. By pairing this framework with Claude Code, you effectively hire an AI junior developer to handle the boilerplate, allowing you to focus purely on high-value business logic.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation by cloning the standardized architecture, ensuring your directory structure is optimized for future growth and maintenance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project with the 'SaaS-Starter' module, including authentication, database ORM, and Tailwind CSS configured for a production-ready environment.

steps.title: Define Schema via Natural Language
steps.description: Translate your client's business requirements into a relational database schema without writing manual SQL or migrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with User, Subscription, and Project models. Include proper indexing and relationship definitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'generate prisma schema based on the provided project requirements file'

steps.title: Bootstrap API Endpoints
steps.description: Automate the creation of CRUD operations to ensure consistency across your API layer and reduce integration bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure Next.js API route handlers for all models defined in the schema, implementing proper Zod validation and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'implement CRUD API endpoints for all models in prisma schema'

steps.title: Inject UI Component Library
steps.description: Standardize your visual language by injecting pre-built, accessible components that integrate seamlessly with your backend data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate the Antigravity UI kit and generate a dashboard layout that fetches data from the newly created API endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'build dashboard view using existing UI kit components'

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Configure CI/CD to handle testing and production deployment, removing the manual overhead of pushing to cloud providers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a GitHub Actions workflow for the Antigravity template that runs linting, testing, and deployment to Vercel on push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'configure github actions for automated testing and deployment'

pro_tips: Always use Zod for runtime type checking at the API boundary to prevent silent data corruption.
Map your database models to UI components using a central 'Contract' file to allow instant updates across the whole stack.
Keep your Claude Code context clean by archiving old feature files; an overloaded context window degrades AI performance.
Standardize your environment variables across all projects to ensure your deployment scripts never fail due to missing keys.
Use Antigravity's 'Hook' system to inject custom logic into the scaffold without modifying the core template files, preserving upgradeability.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, document your custom 'Hooks' into a shared library to make your next project even faster. Review your deployment logs to identify bottlenecks in the CI/CD pipeline.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint and the tools to stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance revenue. Don't let another project turn into a maintenance nightmare. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
